MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Gilbert Jay, Esq., in court, for and with Camelia-Kam Fung Ng, proposed successor Administrator.

Faye Lee, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for and with Aijian Zhang, Special Administrator of the Estate of Denny Ng.

The following matters are called together: PES-01-282440 and PES-22-305699.

At the court's query, counsel offers updates regarding their respective positions. There is discussion re possible settlement via pro bono mediation or another form of dispute resolution. The court suggests the parties try to resolve via a Settlement Conference before a Judge. The parties agree to the preceding and are instructed to contact the ADR Coordinator to schedule a settlement conference. Counsel is provided with the ADR Coordinator's telephone number and email address.

The subject matters are all continued to Jun-02-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status Hearing RE: Mediation or Settlement Conference is added to the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
